definition: FileObject is the Croissant class used to represent individual files that are part of a dataset.
definition_ko: 데이터셋의 개별 파일을 나타내는 Croissant 클래스.
notes: Inherits from sc:CreativeWork; can represent DigitalDocument/MediaObject

definition: In many datasets, data comes in the form of collections of homogeneous files, such as images, videos or text files, where each file needs to be treated as an individual item, e.g., as a training example. FileSet is a class that describes such collections of files.
definition_ko: 동질적인 파일들의 모음(이미지·비디오·텍스트 등)을 표현하는 클래스.
notes: Extends sc:Intangible

definition: A RecordSet describes a set of structured records obtained from one or more data sources (typically a file or set of files) and the structure of these records, expressed as a set of fields (e.g., the columns of a table). A RecordSet can represent flat or nested data.
definition_ko: 하나 이상의 데이터 소스에서 얻은 구조화된 레코드 집합과 그 구조(필드 모음)를 기술. 평면·중첩 데이터 모두 표현 가능.
notes: Subclass of sc:Intangible

definition: A Field is part of a RecordSet. It may represent a column of a table, or a nested data structure or even a nested RecordSet in the case of hierarchical data.
definition_ko: RecordSet의 일부. 테이블의 컬럼·중첩 구조·중첩 RecordSet을 표현 가능.
notes: Subclass of sc:Intangible

definition: DataSource is the class describing the data that can be extracted from files to populate a RecordSet.
definition_ko: RecordSet을 채우기 위해 파일에서 추출할 수 있는 데이터를 기술하는 클래스.
notes: Subclass of sc:Intangible

definition: Sometimes, not all the data from the source is needed, but only a subset. The Extract class can be used to specify how to do that, depending on the type of the data.
definition_ko: 소스에서 부분 데이터만 필요할 때 추출 방식을 지정하는 클래스.

definition: Croissant supports a few simple transformations that can be applied on the source data.
definition_ko: 소스 데이터에 적용할 수 있는 단순 변환들의 클래스.

definition: A format string used to parse the values coming from a DataSource.
definition_ko: DataSource에서 오는 값을 파싱하는 데 쓰이는 포맷 문자열.

definition: Croissant defines the type cr:BoundingBox that interprets any 4-float array as a bounding box.
definition_ko: 4-float 배열을 경계 박스로 해석하는 Croissant 타입.
notes: Used as semantic dataType

definition: Segmentation masks are common annotations in computer vision. They describe pixel-perfect zones that outline objects or groups of objects in images or videos. Croissant defines cr:SegmentationMask with two manners to describe them.
definition_ko: 이미지·비디오에서 객체 영역을 픽셀 단위로 표시하는 분할 마스크 타입.
notes: Used as semantic dataType; can be sc:GeoShape (polygon) or sc:ImageObject

definition: ML datasets may come in different data splits, intended to be used for different steps of a model building.
definition_ko: ML 데이터셋의 데이터 분할을 표현하는 시맨틱 dataType 클래스.
notes: [CHECK] Spec describes via section intro rather than formal class definition. Used as dataType marker on RecordSet

definition: Identifies the training subset of a dataset (the split used to train ML models).
definition_ko: 데이터셋의 학습 분할 (모델 학습용).
notes: [CHECK] Spec only shows in example data; no standalone formal definition. Definition synthesized from context

definition: Identifies the validation subset of a dataset (the split used to tune model hyperparameters).
definition_ko: 데이터셋의 검증 분할 (하이퍼파라미터 튜닝용).
notes: [CHECK] Spec only shows in example data; no standalone formal definition

definition: Identifies the test subset of a dataset (the split used to evaluate the final model).
definition_ko: 데이터셋의 테스트 분할 (최종 모델 평가용).
notes: [CHECK] Spec only shows in example data; no standalone formal definition

definition: Most ML workflows use label data. In Croissant, we identify label data using the class cr:Label. Labels will typically appear as fields in a RecordSet. The default semantics is that labels apply to the record they are defined in.
definition_ko: ML 워크플로우의 레이블 데이터를 식별하는 클래스. RecordSet의 필드로 출현.
notes: Used as dataType marker

definition: A citation to the dataset itself, or a citation for a publication that describes the dataset. Ideally, citations should be expressed using the bibtex format. Note that this is different from schema.org/citation, which is used to make a citation to another publication from this dataset.
definition_ko: 데이터셋 자체 또는 데이터셋을 기술하는 출판물에 대한 인용. bibtex 형식 권장.
notes: ONE cardinality per spec

definition: A column name (used in Extract for CSV FileObject sources to extract values in the specified column).
definition_ko: 추출할 CSV 컬럼 이름.
notes: Spec defines via Extract table; quoted text combined from column header 'A column name' + result description

definition: Another FileObject or FileSet that this one is contained in, e.g., in the case of a file extracted from an archive. When this property is present, the contentUrl is evaluated as a relative path within the container object.
definition_ko: 이 파일이 포함된 다른 FileObject 또는 FileSet (예: 아카이브에서 추출된 파일).
notes: [CHECK] Not in JSON-LD context; defined in spec body only. MANY cardinality. FileSet definition extends: 'If multiple values are provided for containedIn, then the union of their contents is taken'

definition: One or more records that constitute the data of the RecordSet.
definition_ko: RecordSet의 데이터를 구성하는 레코드.
notes: MANY cardinality; @json typed in JSON-LD context

definition: The data type of the field, identified by the URI of the corresponding class. It could be either an atomic type (e.g, sc:Integer) or a semantic type (e.g., sc:GeoLocation).
definition_ko: 필드의 데이터 타입. 대응 클래스의 URI로 식별. 원자 타입(sc:Integer) 또는 시맨틱 타입(sc:GeoLocation) 가능.
notes: MANY cardinality; @vocab typed in JSON-LD context

definition: A property that is equivalent to this Field. Used in the case a dataType is specified on the RecordSet to map specific fields to specific properties associated with that dataType.
definition_ko: 이 Field에 동등한 속성. RecordSet에 dataType이 지정된 경우 특정 필드를 해당 dataType과 연관된 속성에 매핑할 때 사용.
notes: [CHECK] Not in JSON-LD context; defined in Field properties table. MANY cardinality

definition: One or more records provided as example content of the RecordSet, or a reference to data source that contains examples.
definition_ko: RecordSet의 예시 내용으로 제공되는 레코드 또는 예시를 담은 데이터 소스 참조.
notes: MANY cardinality; @json typed in JSON-LD context

definition: A glob pattern that specifies the files to exclude.
definition_ko: 제외할 파일을 지정하는 glob 패턴.
notes: [CHECK] Not in JSON-LD context; defined in FileSet properties table. MANY cardinality

definition: The extraction method from the provided source.
definition_ko: 제공된 소스로부터의 추출 방식.
notes: ONE cardinality

definition: A data element that appears in the records of the RecordSet (e.g., one column of a table).
definition_ko: RecordSet의 레코드에 출현하는 데이터 요소 (예: 테이블의 한 컬럼).
notes: MANY cardinality

definition: The name of the referenced FileObject source of the data.
definition_ko: 참조된 FileObject 데이터 소스의 이름.
notes: ONE cardinality; references via @id

definition: One of: fullpath, filename, content, lines, lineNumbers (used in Extract on FileObject/FileSet to select a file-level property).
definition_ko: 파일 수준 속성 선택 (fullpath, filename, content, lines, lineNumbers 중 하나).
notes: Spec lists 5 enum values in Extract table

definition: The name of the referenced FileSet source of the data.
definition_ko: 참조된 FileSet 데이터 소스의 이름.
notes: ONE cardinality; references via @id

definition: A format to parse the values of the data from text, e.g., a date format or number format.
definition_ko: 텍스트에서 데이터 값을 파싱하는 포맷 (예: 날짜·숫자 포맷).
notes: ONE cardinality

definition: A glob pattern that specifies the files to include.
definition_ko: 포함할 파일을 지정하는 glob 패턴.
notes: MANY cardinality

definition: Whether the dataset is a live dataset.
definition_ko: 데이터셋이 라이브 데이터셋인지 여부.
notes: ONE cardinality. Live dataset = data evolves continuously (new snapshots released regularly)

definition: A JSONPath expression (used in Extract on JSON sources to select values).
definition_ko: JSON 소스에서 값을 선택하는 JSONPath 표현식.
notes: Defined in Extract table for JSON source

definition: One or more fields whose values uniquely identify each record in the RecordSet.
definition_ko: RecordSet의 각 레코드를 고유하게 식별하는 하나 이상의 필드.
notes: MANY cardinality

definition: The MD5 checksum of the file contents.
definition_ko: 파일 내용의 MD5 체크섬.
notes: [CHECK] Not formally defined as a standalone property in spec body; appears only in JSON-LD context. Definition synthesized from sc:sha256 analogy

definition: A special case of SubField that should be hidden because it references a Field that already appears in the RecordSet.
definition_ko: RecordSet에 이미 출현한 Field를 참조하므로 감춰야 하는 SubField의 특수 형태.
notes: MANY cardinality

definition: (No definition provided in specification body)
definition_ko: (명세 본문에 정의 없음)
notes: [CHECK] Appears only in JSON-LD context (Appendix 1); no description in spec body. Possibly reserved/forward-looking

definition: The name of the referenced RecordSet source.
definition_ko: 참조된 RecordSet 소스의 이름.
notes: ONE cardinality per DataSource table. Same alias also used at sc:Dataset level to list RecordSets (MANY); spec doesn't formally define dual-domain usage. [CHECK]

definition: Another Field of another RecordSet that this field references. This is the equivalent of a foreign key reference in a relational database.
definition_ko: 이 필드가 참조하는 다른 RecordSet의 다른 Field. 관계형 DB의 외래 키에 해당.
notes: MANY cardinality

definition: A regular expression to parse the data.
definition_ko: 데이터를 파싱하는 정규 표현식.
notes: One of the supported transformations

definition: If true, then the Field is a list of values of type dataType.
definition_ko: true이면 Field는 dataType 타입의 값 리스트가 됨.
notes: ONE cardinality

definition: A string replacement operation applied to source data values.
definition_ko: 소스 데이터 값에 적용되는 문자열 치환 연산.
notes: [CHECK] Not formally defined in spec body text; only appears in JSON-LD context. Definition synthesized from Transform context

definition: The character used to split a string into an array.
definition_ko: 문자열을 배열로 분할하는 데 사용되는 문자.
notes: [CHECK] Spec mentions 'delimiter' in Transform list but JSON-LD context uses 'separator' (cr:separator). Likely terminology mismatch in spec

definition: The data source of the field. This will generally reference a FileObject or FileSet's contents (e.g.
definition_ko: a specific column of a table).
concept_tag: 필드의 데이터 소스. 일반적으로 FileObject·FileSet의 내용을 참조 (예: 테이블의 특정 컬럼).

definition: Another Field that is nested inside this one.
definition_ko: 이 Field 안에 중첩된 또 다른 Field.
notes: MANY cardinality

definition: A transformation to apply on source data on top of the extracted method as specified through extract, e.g., a regular expression or JSON query.
definition_ko: extract로 지정된 추출 방식 위에 소스 데이터에 적용할 변환 (예: 정규 표현식·JSON 쿼리).
notes: MANY cardinality
